name: NyxID Credential Broker
description: OAuth login to NyxID and delegated access to user-connected services, with API key fallback for self-hosted installs.

clientId.description: OAuth client ID from the NyxID developer portal. Required for OAuth login.

clientSecret.description: OAuth client secret. Required for confidential-client token exchange.

defaultScopes.description: Scopes requested during NyxID OAuth login.

delegationScopes.description: Scopes requested for delegated proxy access.

apiKey.description: Optional NyxID API key for installs that do not use OAuth.
